meaning: n.工业家,实业家,工厂主,产业工人
examples: He is generally rated the country's No. 3 industrialist.
Catlin sold the paintings to Philadelphia industrialist Joseph Harrison.
The British industrialist James Louis, held by kidnapper in central Africa for the past 8 months, was released unharmed yesterday.
Speculation centres instead on his super-minister for economic development, Corrado Passera, a former banker and industrialist.
There might not be a better time for advisors to listen to their inner industrialist.
